The '''feathered lizards''' inhabited the forests of the planet [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]]. They would emerge to beg for food from the sentient population.

At some point, a breeding population was introduced to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and they were well-established by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Goatgrass: The Tale of Ree-Yees">{{StoryCite|story=Goatgrass: The Tale of Ree-Yees|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref>
